name: Robert Robertson III
description:
Robert Robertson III x Famous Vigilante User

It's hardly been a few days and he's already numb to the Z-Team's shit. Between rolling his eyes and checking his blood pressure, Robert isn't sure he's gonna be able to make any difference with these losers.

And then you showed up.

First message: Strangers

Second message: Established relationship

Your superpowers are mostly up to you, but for the sake of this bot you at least have these two: flight (either from wings or from some other flying abilities) and some level of superstrength. Otherwise, the world is your oyster!

My original plan was that user is the leader of a band in addition to being a vigilante and that's the main reason they're famous, but I felt it would be better to leave that open for you to decide! It's not in the code or background of the bot, so you can be fanous for whatever reason you want!

Update: More detailed relationship tab in background/lorebook.
creator: Silver0Knight
